tEn: Seed1.8 Model Card: Towards Generalized Real-World Agency
tZh: Seed1.8 模型卡：迈向通用现实世界代理
sEn: Seed1.8 is a foundation model for generalized real-world agency, supporting multi-turn interaction, tool use, and multi-step execution.
sZh: Seed1.8 是一个面向通用现实世界代理的基础模型，支持多轮交互、工具使用和多步执行。
absEn: We present Seed1.8, a foundation model aimed at generalized real-world agency: going beyond single-turn prediction to multi-turn interaction, tool use, and multi-step execution. Seed1.8 keeps strong LLM and vision-language performance while supporting a unified agentic interface-search, code generation and execution, and GUI interaction. For deployment, it offers latency- and cost-aware inference, including configurable thinking modes and optimized visual encoding for images and video. We report evaluations on standard benchmarks and application-aligned workflows spanning foundational skills, multimodal understanding, and agentic behavior. Seed1.8 is released to support further research and development on interactive, real-world use cases.
absZh: 我们推出了 Seed1.8，这是一个旨在实现通用现实世界代理的基础模型：超越单轮预测，实现多轮交互、工具使用和多步执行。Seed1.8 在保持强大的大语言模型和视觉语言性能的同时，支持统一的代理接口——搜索、代码生成与执行以及图形用户界面交互。在部署方面，它提供了延迟和成本感知的推理，包括可配置的思考模式以及针对图像和视频优化的视觉编码。我们报告了在标准基准测试和面向应用的工作流程上的评估结果，涵盖基础技能、多模态理解和代理行为。Seed1.8 已发布，以支持交互式现实世界用例的进一步研究和开发。

contrib.en: Proposes Seed1.8, a foundation model for generalized real-world agency with multi-turn interaction, tool use, and multi-step execution.
contrib.zh: 提出Seed1.8，一个面向通用现实世界智能体的基础模型，支持多轮交互、工具使用和多步执行。

contrib.en: Integrates strong LLM and VLM capabilities with a unified agentic interface for search, code generation, and GUI interaction.
contrib.zh: 将强大的LLM和VLM能力与统一的智能体接口集成，支持搜索、代码生成和GUI交互。

contrib.en: Introduces configurable thinking modes (no_think, think-low/medium/high) for latency- and cost-aware inference.
contrib.zh: 引入可配置的思考模式（无思考、低/中/高思考），实现延迟和成本感知的推理。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple agentic benchmarks including GAIA, OSWorld, and BrowseComp.
contrib.zh: 在多个智能体基准测试（包括GAIA、OSWorld和BrowseComp）上达到最先进性能。

contrib.en: Demonstrates strong token efficiency in multimodal tasks, especially long-video understanding with minimal token budgets.
contrib.zh: 在多模态任务中展现出强大的词元效率，尤其是在最小词元预算下的长视频理解方面。

contrib.en: Provides comprehensive evaluations across foundational, multimodal, and agentic capabilities with real-world-oriented benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 通过面向现实的基准测试，在基础、多模态和智能体能力方面提供全面评估。

limits.en: Performance on disciplinary video knowledge benchmarks (VideoMMMU, MMVU) lags behind Gemini-2.5/3-Pro.
limits.zh: 在学科视频知识基准（VideoMMMU、MMVU）上的表现落后于Gemini-2.5/3-Pro。

limits.en: Motion perception on TOMATO benchmark still has a significant gap compared to human performance.
limits.zh: 在TOMATO基准上的运动感知与人类表现仍有显著差距。

limits.en: Agentic coding benchmarks like SWE-bench Verified show performance on par but not surpassing top models.
limits.zh: 在SWE-bench Verified等智能体编码基准上表现持平但未超越顶级模型。

limits.en: Internal benchmarks for high-value applications may not fully generalize to all real-world scenarios.
limits.zh: 面向高价值应用的内部基准可能无法完全泛化到所有现实场景。

limits.en: Safety evaluations rely on internal benchmarks and open-source tests; coverage of all risk types is not exhaustive.
limits.zh: 安全评估依赖内部基准和开源测试，未涵盖所有风险类型。

items.en: Recent progress in large language models (LLMs) and vision–language models (VLMs) has enabled strong performance on foundational capabilities, including natural language understanding, reasoning, code generation, and multimodal perception. These capabilities provide a general substrate for interpreting user intent and producing structured outputs. However, many real-world applications require models to go beyond single-turn prediction and operate in interactive settings that involve tool use, environment feedback, and multi-step task execution.
items.zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）和视觉-语言模型（VLM）的最新进展已在基础能力上实现了强劲性能，包括自然语言理解、推理、代码生成和多模态感知。这些能力为解释用户意图和生成结构化输出提供了通用基础。然而，许多实际应用要求模型超越单轮预测，在涉及工具使用、环境反馈和多步骤任务执行的交互式场景中运行。

items.en: Seed1.8 is developed to support generalized real-world agency. The model is designed to retain core LLM and VLM capabilities while extending them toward multi-turn interaction and task execution. Rather than introducing task-specific agent pipelines, Seed1.8 emphasizes integration of perception, reasoning, and action within a single model. The design of Seed1.8 is guided by the following considerations:
items.zh: Seed1.8 旨在支持通用的现实世界智能体行为。该模型设计为保留核心 LLM 和 VLM 能力，同时将其扩展到多轮交互和任务执行。Seed1.8 不引入特定任务的智能体流水线，而是强调将感知、推理和行动集成在单一模型中。Seed1.8 的设计遵循以下考虑：

items.en: Strong Base Capabilities. Seed1.8 maintains competitive performance on standard LLM and VLM benchmarks, including reasoning, complex instruction following, knowledge coverage, and multimodal understanding. These capabilities provide the foundation for downstream agentic behavior.
items.zh: 强大的基础能力。Seed1.8 在标准 LLM 和 VLM 基准测试中保持有竞争力的性能，包括推理、复杂指令遵循、知识覆盖和多模态理解。这些能力为下游智能体行为提供了基础。

items.en: Unified Agentic Interaction and Multi-Step Execution. Seed1.8 supports search, code generation and execution, and graphical user interface (GUI) interaction within a unified agentic interface. The model is designed to perform iterative decision making over multiple steps, where intermediate results from retrieval, code execution, and environment interaction inform subsequent actions. Search capabilities enable information gathering and evidence synthesis from external sources, while code-centric execution supports structured computation, program modification, and tool orchestration. Native visual perception further allows the model to interpret and interact with visual interfaces—such as screenshots, documents, charts, and videos—enabling direct operation in software environments when programmatic APIs are unavailable.
items.zh: 统一的智能体交互与多步骤执行。Seed1.8 在统一的智能体接口中支持搜索、代码生成与执行以及图形用户界面（GUI）交互。该模型设计为在多个步骤上执行迭代决策，其中来自检索、代码执行和环境交互的中间结果指导后续行动。搜索能力支持从外部来源收集信息和综合证据，而以代码为中心的执行支持结构化计算、程序修改和工具编排。原生视觉感知进一步允许模型解释和交互视觉界面——如截图、文档、图表和视频——从而在程序化 API 不可用时直接在软件环境中操作。

items.en: Latency- and Cost-Aware Inference. Interactive deployment introduces constraints on response time and computational overhead, particularly for multimodal and long-context inputs. Seed1.8 provides configurable thinking modes to balance inference depth and latency, and incorporates optimized visual encoding to reduce token consumption for image and video inputs.
items.zh: 延迟与成本感知的推理。交互式部署对响应时间和计算开销引入了约束，特别是对于多模态和长上下文输入。Seed1.8 提供可配置的思考模式以平衡推理深度和延迟，并采用优化的视觉编码以减少图像和视频输入的 token 消耗。

items.en: Evaluation Aligned with Practical Use. Model development and validation are guided by a combination of public benchmarks and internal evaluations derived from high-value application domains. These evaluations span foundational capabilities, multimodal understanding, and agentic workflows, enabling assessment across a range of realistic usage patterns.
items.zh: 与实际使用对齐的评估。模型开发和验证由公共基准测试和来自高价值应用领域的内部评估共同指导。这些评估涵盖基础能力、多模态理解和智能体工作流，从而能够在各种实际使用模式中进行评估。

items.en: In the remainder of this report, we present a detailed evaluation covering foundational LLM and VLM capabilities, agentic performance, and efficiency in both public benchmarks and real-world-inspired workflows.
items.zh: 在本报告的其余部分，我们提供了详细的评估，涵盖基础 LLM 和 VLM 能力、智能体性能以及在公共基准测试和现实世界启发的工作流中的效率。

items.en: While established academic benchmarks remain informative for measuring core competencies (e.g., reasoning, knowledge, and instruction following), real-world deployment also depends on multimodal perception, tool use, and end-to-end task completion under latency and interaction constraints. In this section, we report a comprehensive evaluation of Seed1.8 across three categories. First, we summarize fundamental LLM capabilities—reasoning, complex instruction following, and knowledge—together with several internal benchmarks intended to approximate high-value application patterns (Table 1). Second, we evaluate multimodal (VLM) capabilities, including image and video understanding, along with efficiency analyses under varying inference budgets (Table 2 and Table 3). Third, we assess agentic capabilities that require multi-turn interaction with external resources—search, coding and tool use, writing, and GUI-based execution (Table 4, Table 5, Table 7, and Table 6). Seed1.8 supports four thinking modes: no_think, think-low, think-medium, and think-high, which differ in the amount of test-time computation allocated and allow controlled trade-offs between latency, computational cost, and solution quality across tasks. In section˜2.1, section˜2.2, and section˜2.3 we report the scores of Seed1.8 using think-high. We also visualize the performance and cost comparison of different thinking modes in section˜2.4.
items.zh: 虽然已建立的学术基准测试对于衡量核心能力（如推理、知识和指令遵循）仍然具有参考价值，但实际部署还取决于多模态感知、工具使用以及在延迟和交互约束下的端到端任务完成。在本节中，我们报告了 Seed1.8 在三个类别上的全面评估。首先，我们总结了基础 LLM 能力——推理、复杂指令遵循和知识——以及几个旨在近似高价值应用模式的内部基准测试（表 1）。其次，我们评估了多模态（VLM）能力，包括图像和视频理解，以及在不同推理预算下的效率分析（表 2 和表 3）。第三，我们评估了需要与外部资源进行多轮交互的智能体能力——搜索、编码和工具使用、写作以及基于 GUI 的执行（表 4、表 5、表 7 和表 6）。Seed1.8 支持四种思考模式：no_think、think-low、think-medium 和 think-high，它们在分配的测试时计算量上有所不同，并允许在延迟、计算成本和任务解决方案质量之间进行可控权衡。在第 2.1、2.2 和 2.3 节中，我们报告了 Seed1.8 使用 think-high 的分数。我们还在第 2.4 节中可视化了不同思考模式的性能和成本比较。

items.en: This section evaluates Seed1.8’s fundamental capabilities, including reasoning, complex instruction following, and knowledge. Furthermore, we build internal benchmarks designed to mirror high-value real-world applications and demonstrate the economic utility of Seed1.8. We compare the results with GPT-5-high, Claude-Sonnet-4.5, Gemini-2.5-pro and Gemini-3-pro.
items.zh: 本节评估 Seed1.8 的基础能力，包括推理、复杂指令遵循和知识。此外，我们构建了旨在反映高价值现实世界应用的内部基准测试，并展示了 Seed1.8 的经济效用。我们将结果与 GPT-5-high、Claude-Sonnet-4.5、Gemini-2.5-pro 和 Gemini-3-pro 进行比较。

items.en: Specifically, we evaluate Seed1.8 on AIME-25 [4], HMMT-25(Feb) [4], BeyondAIME [7], AMO-Bench [3], IMO-AnswerBench [42], AetherCode [75], LiveCodeBench(v6) [32], LiveCodeBench pro [93], GPQA-Diamond [57], PHYBench [55], BioBench, KOR-Bench [43], ARC-AGI-1 [53], Inverse IFEval [90], MARS-Bench [81], MultiChallenge [17], Collie-Hard [84], EIFBench [99], MMLU [27], MMLU-pro [72], SuperGPQA [19], LPFQA [97], as well as six internal benchmarks designed for high-value real-world tasks.
items.zh: 具体来说，我们在 AIME-25 [4]、HMMT-25(Feb) [4]、BeyondAIME [7]、AMO-Bench [3]、IMO-AnswerBench [42]、AetherCode [75]、LiveCodeBench(v6) [32]、LiveCodeBench pro [93]、GPQA-Diamond [57]、PHYBench [55]、BioBench、KOR-Bench [43]、ARC-AGI-1 [53]、Inverse IFEval [90]、MARS-Bench [81]、MultiChallenge [17]、Collie-Hard [84]、EIFBench [99]、MMLU [27]、MMLU-pro [72]、SuperGPQA [19]、LPFQA [97] 以及六个为高价值现实世界任务设计的内部基准测试上评估 Seed1.8。

items.en: We categorize reasoning into coding, mathematics, STEM, and general reasoning. These capabilities serve as the foundation for real-world utility. We prioritize the model’s robustness and generalization capabilities, ensuring it can reliably solve complex problems across diverse environments. Seed1.8 achieves performance competitive with leading state-of-the-art models in both coding and mathematics, and achieves the second-highest scores on BeyondAIME [7], AMO-Bench [3], and IMO-AnswerBench [42]. Furthermore, in STEM and general reasoning, Seed1.8 is on par with leading LLMs like GPT-5 High, Claude-Sonnet-4.5, and Gemini-3-pro, and achieves the second-best performance on KOR-Bench [43] and ARC-AGI-1 [53].
items.zh: 我们将推理分为编码、数学、STEM 和通用推理。这些能力是现实世界效用的基础。我们优先考虑模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力，确保其能够在不同环境中可靠地解决复杂问题。Seed1.8 在编码和数学方面均达到了与领先的最先进模型相竞争的性能，并在 BeyondAIME [7]、AMO-Bench [3] 和 IMO-AnswerBench [42] 上取得了第二高的分数。此外，在 STEM 和通用推理方面，Seed1.8 与 GPT-5 High、Claude-Sonnet-4.5 和 Gemini-3-pro 等领先 LLM 相当，并在 KOR-Bench [43] 和 ARC-AGI-1 [53] 上取得了第二好的性能。

items.en: The ability to execute complex instructions and adhere to explicit user constraints is crucial for the real-world utility. Seed1.8 demonstrates robust capabilities across various instruction following (IF) benchmarks. Notably, it achieves the second-best score on Inverse IFEval [90] and maintains competitive standing on MARS-Bench [81], MultiChallenge [17], Collie-Hard [84], and EIFBench [99]. Collectively, these results validate the model’s precise controllability, confirming its reliability for complex agentic workflows.
items.zh: 执行复杂指令并遵守显式用户约束的能力对于现实世界的效用至关重要。Seed1.8 在各种指令遵循（IF）基准测试中展示了强大的能力。值得注意的是，它在 Inverse IFEval [90] 上取得了第二好的分数，并在 MARS-Bench [81]、MultiChallenge [17]、Collie-Hard [84] 和 EIFBench [99] 上保持了有竞争力的地位。这些结果共同验证了模型的精确可控性，确认了其在复杂智能体工作流中的可靠性。

items.en: Broad domain coverage and high factual accuracy are critical for establishing user trust in open-domain applications For general knowledge, Seed1.8 performs on par with leading LLMs on MMLU [27] and MMLU-pro [72]. Furthermore, the model demonstrates competitive performance of long-tail knowledge, ensuring a robust foundation for diverse real-world tasks.
items.zh: 广泛的领域覆盖和高事实准确性对于在开放域应用中建立用户信任至关重要。对于通用知识，Seed1.8 在 MMLU [27] 和 MMLU-pro [72] 上与领先 LLM 表现相当。此外，该模型在长尾知识方面展示了有竞争力的性能，为多样化的现实世界任务提供了坚实基础。

items.en: Beyond fundamental capabilities such as reasoning, instruction following, and knowledge, we prioritize high-value real-world applications. We have designed specialized internal benchmarks to rigorously validate that Seed1.8’s development aligns with practical economic utility. Specifically, our internal benchmarks include:
items.zh: 除了推理、指令遵循和知识等基础能力外，我们优先考虑高价值的现实世界应用。我们设计了专门的内部基准测试，以严格验证 Seed1.8 的开发与实际经济效用保持一致。具体来说，我们的内部基准测试包括：

items.en: Education. Evaluates performance in teaching-oriented scenarios, including problem solving, grading, explanation, and question generation, covering core subjects across K–12 levels.
items.zh: 教育。评估教学导向场景中的性能，包括问题解决、评分、解释和问题生成，涵盖 K–12 级别的核心科目。

items.en: Customer Support Q&A. Assesses the ability to resolve user issues using enterprise knowledge bases, such as answering policy-related questions in domains including e-commerce, government services, telecommunications, internet platforms, and human resources.
items.zh: 客户支持问答。评估使用企业知识库解决用户问题的能力，例如回答电子商务、政府服务、电信、互联网平台和人力资源等领域的政策相关问题。

items.en: Information Processing. Measures the ability to analyze and synthesize unstructured data, such as summarizing viewpoints and identifying overall sentiment from large collections of user-generated content.
items.zh: 信息处理。衡量分析和综合非结构化数据的能力，例如从大量用户生成内容中总结观点并识别整体情感。

items.en: Intention Recognition. Evaluates intent classification based on diverse textual sources, including dialogues, meeting transcripts, social media posts, and articles (e.g., inferring purchase intent from customer service interactions).
items.zh: 意图识别。评估基于多样化文本来源（包括对话、会议记录、社交媒体帖子和文章）的意图分类（例如，从客户服务交互中推断购买意图）。

items.en: Information Extraction. Assesses structured extraction of relevant elements (e.g., words, sentences, or fields) from heterogeneous documents, including meeting records, legal texts, contracts, product descriptions, and corporate knowledge bases.
items.zh: 信息抽取。评估从异构文档（包括会议记录、法律文本、合同、产品描述和企业知识库）中结构化提取相关元素（如词语、句子或字段）的能力。

items.en: Complex Workflow. Evaluates step-by-step task execution following predefined Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), such as multi-turn after-sales service processes, across domains including customer support, education, sales, healthcare, and human resources.
items.zh: 复杂工作流。评估按照预定义标准操作程序（SOP）逐步执行任务的能力，例如多轮售后服务流程，涵盖客户支持、教育、销售、医疗保健和人力资源等领域。

items.en: Seed1.8 achieves the best performance on the Education and Customer Support Q&A benchmarks. It also maintains competitive performance in Information Processing, Intention Recognition, Information Extraction, and Complex Workflows. These results confirm Seed1.8’s readiness for deployment in high-impact business scenarios.
items.zh: Seed1.8 在教育和客户支持问答基准测试中取得了最佳性能。在信息处理、意图识别、信息提取和复杂工作流方面也保持了有竞争力的性能。这些结果证实了 Seed1.8 已准备好部署在高影响力的业务场景中。

items.en: We extensively evaluated the performance of Seed1.8 on a comprehensive set of public image benchmarks, comparing it against existing multimodal models, including Claude-Sonnet-4.5, GPT-5.1 (High), Gemini 2.5 Pro, Gemini 3 Pro, and Seed1.5-VL. Overall, Seed1.8 demonstrates significant performance improvements over its predecessor Seed1.5-VL across visual tasks, exhibiting highly competitive capabilities that approach the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) model Gemini 3 Pro. Notably, Seed1.8 outperforms Gemini 3 Pro on several challenging benchmarks [58, 68, 83], showcasing exceptional perception and reasoning abilities.
items.zh: 我们在全面的公开图像基准测试集上广泛评估了 Seed1.8 的性能，并将其与现有的多模态模型（包括 Claude-Sonnet-4.5、GPT-5.1 (High)、Gemini 2.5 Pro、Gemini 3 Pro 和 Seed1.5-VL）进行了比较。总体而言，Seed1.8 在视觉任务上相比其前身 Seed1.5-VL 表现出显著的性能提升，展现出极具竞争力的能力，接近当前最先进的模型 Gemini 3 Pro。值得注意的是，Seed1.8 在几个具有挑战性的基准测试 [58, 68, 83] 上优于 Gemini 3 Pro，展示了卓越的感知和推理能力。

items.en: Regarding MultiModal Reasoning, Seed1.8 delivers outstanding results across ten benchmarks. It secures the SOTA position on ZeroBench [58] (main) with a Pass@1 score of 11.0, surpassing Gemini 3 Pro’s 10.0. Across 7 out of 9 other benchmarks – including MMMU [85], MathVista [41], and MathVision [70], Seed1.8 achieves the second-highest scores, closely trailing Gemini 3 Pro while outperforming all other competitors. In General Visual Question Answering (VQA), Seed1.8 demonstrates exceptional robustness and performance. It achieves SOTA on VLMsAreBiased [68] with a score of 62.0, surpassing Gemini 3 Pro’s 50.6 by a significant margin, and ranks first on multi-image understanding (MUIRBench [69]) – outperforming both Gemini 3 Pro and GPT-5.1 High. For all other VQA benchmarks, Seed1.8 secures the second place, highlighting its robust perceptual capabilities [68, 56, 25], strong general visual proficiency [89, 12, 37], and consistent multi-image understanding performance [69, 66].
items.zh: 关于多模态推理，Seed1.8 在十个基准测试中取得了出色结果。它在 ZeroBench [58]（主要）上以 11.0 的 Pass@1 分数获得了最先进水平，超过了 Gemini 3 Pro 的 10.0。在其他 9 个基准测试中的 7 个（包括 MMMU [85]、MathVista [41] 和 MathVision [70]）上，Seed1.8 取得了第二高的分数，紧随 Gemini 3 Pro 之后，同时优于所有其他竞争对手。在通用视觉问答中，Seed1.8 展示了卓越的鲁棒性和性能。它在 VLMsAreBiased [68] 上以 62.0 的分数取得了最先进水平，显著超过 Gemini 3 Pro 的 50.6，并在多图像理解（MUIRBench [69]）上排名第一——优于 Gemini 3 Pro 和 GPT-5.1 High。对于所有其他 VQA 基准测试，Seed1.8 获得了第二名，突显了其强大的感知能力 [68, 56, 25]、强大的通用视觉熟练度 [89, 12, 37] 以及一致的多图像理解性能 [69, 66]。

items.en: Seed1.8 also maintains exceptional performance across a range of specialized tasks. In GUI Grounding, the basic grounding ability in GUI Agent, Seed1.8 (64.3) demonstrates an improvement over Seed-1.5-VL (60.9) on the challenging ScreenSpot-Pro [34] benchmark and achieves a new state-of-the-art score 73.1 when it is allowed to use the “crop-box” tool to inspect a specific area in detail. It also delivers strong results on two counting tasks [49, 2], achieving performance very close to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) Gemini 3 Pro. In 2D & 3D Spatial Understanding, Seed1.8 establishes new SOTA performance on two critical benchmarks: DA-2K [82] (90.7 Pass@1) and MMSIBench [83] (circular, 25.8 Pass@1), outperforming Gemini 3 Pro (82.1 and 25.4, respectively). For Document & Chart Understanding, Seed1.8 delivers strong performance with notable efficiency gains. On OmniDocBench 1.5 [48] (with Normalized Edit Distance, NED as the metric), Seed1.8 achieves 0.106, surpassing Gemini 3 Pro’s 0.115 and significantly outperforming Seed1.5-VL (0.152) by 0.046. In MultiModal Long-Context Understanding, Seed1.8 demonstrates SOTA performance on MMLB-NIAH [74] (128k context length) with 72.2 Pass@1, surpassing Gemini 3 Pro’s 70.5. It also ranks second on DUDE [67] and MMLB-VRAG, delivering substantial improvements over Seed1.5-VL.
items.zh: Seed1.8 还在一系列专门任务中保持了卓越的性能。在 GUI 基础定位（GUI Agent 的基本定位能力）方面，Seed1.8 (64.3) 在具有挑战性的 ScreenSpot-Pro [34] 基准测试上相比 Seed-1.5-VL (60.9) 有所提升，并且当允许使用“裁剪框”工具详细检查特定区域时，取得了新的最先进分数 73.1。它还在两个计数任务 [49, 2] 上取得了强劲结果，性能非常接近最先进的 Gemini 3 Pro。在 2D 和 3D 空间理解方面，Seed1.8 在两个关键基准测试上建立了新的最先进性能：DA-2K [82]（90.7 Pass@1）和 MMSIBench [83]（圆形，25.8 Pass@1），优于 Gemini 3 Pro（分别为 82.1 和 25.4）。在文档和图表理解方面，Seed1.8 提供了强劲的性能，并具有显著的效率提升。在 OmniDocBench 1.5 [48]（以归一化编辑距离为指标）上，Seed1.8 达到 0.106，优于 Gemini 3 Pro 的 0.115，并显著超过 Seed1.5-VL (0.152) 0.046。在多模态长上下文理解方面，Seed1.8 在 MMLB-NIAH [74]（128k 上下文长度）上以 72.2 Pass@1 展示了最先进性能，超过了 Gemini 3 Pro 的 70.5。它还在 DUDE [67] 和 MMLB-VRAG 上排名第二，相比 Seed1.5-VL 有显著提升。

items.en: We evaluate the video understanding capabilities of Seed1.8 across four dimensions: Knowledge & Reasoning, Motion & Perception, Long Video, and Streaming Video Understanding. As presented in Table 3, Seed1.8 demonstrates significant advancements over Seed1.5-VL across all dimensions, achieving SOTA performance particularly in the domain of Motion & Perception.
items.zh: 我们在四个维度上评估了 Seed1.8 的视频理解能力：知识与推理、运动与感知、长视频和流式视频理解。如表 3 所示，Seed1.8 在所有维度上相比 Seed1.5-VL 都有显著进步，特别是在运动与感知领域取得了最先进性能。

items.en: Knowledge & Reasoning. This dimension assesses video knowledge and reasoning. Seed1.8 delivers leading results on the comprehensive reasoning benchmarks VCRBench [54] and VideoHolmes [13]. The model also demonstrates a significant improvement over Seed-1.5-VL on VideoReasonBench [39], a task emphasizing state-transition reasoning. Despite these reasoning strengths, Seed1.8 currently lags behind Gemini-2.5/3-Pro on disciplinary knowledge benchmarks (VideoMMMU [29], MMVU [92], VideoSimpleQA [8]), highlighting areas for further refinement.
items.zh: 知识与推理。该维度评估视频知识和推理。Seed1.8 在综合推理基准测试 VCRBench [54] 和 VideoHolmes [13] 上取得了领先结果。该模型在强调状态转换推理的任务 VideoReasonBench [39] 上相比 Seed-1.5-VL 也有显著提升。尽管有这些推理优势，Seed1.8 目前在学科知识基准测试（VideoMMMU [29]、MMVU [92]、VideoSimpleQA [8]）上落后于 Gemini-2.5/3-Pro，这突出了需要进一步改进的领域。

items.en: Motion & Perception. Focusing on fine-grained visual perception and temporal dynamics, Seed1.8 exhibits exceptional proficiency. It achieves SOTA performance in 5 out of 6 evaluated tasks, underscoring its precise video perception capabilities. Notably, while Seed1.8 achieves a score of 60.660.6 on the challenging TOMATO [60] benchmark, a significant gap remains compared to human performance (95.295.2). Future work will bridge this gap to achieve human-level motion perception.
items.zh: 运动与感知。专注于细粒度视觉感知和时间动态，Seed1.8 表现出卓越的熟练度。它在 6 个评估任务中的 5 个上取得了最先进性能，突显了其精确的视频感知能力。值得注意的是，虽然 Seed1.8 在具有挑战性的 TOMATO [60] 基准测试上取得了 60.6 的分数，但与人类表现（95.2）相比仍有显著差距。未来的工作将弥合这一差距，以实现人类水平的运动感知。

items.en: Long Video. For long video evaluation, we select four representative benchmarks: VideoMME [21], CGBench [10], LongVideoBench [79], and LVBench [71]. Seed1.8 exhibits marked improvements over Seed1.5-VL. Moreover, Seed1.8 demonstrates efficient long-context retention, performing on par with Gemini-2.5/3-Pro under a maximum video token constraint of 81,92081,920.
items.zh: 长视频。对于长视频评估，我们选择了四个代表性基准测试：VideoMME [21]、CGBench [10]、LongVideoBench [79] 和 LVBench [71]。Seed1.8 相比 Seed1.5-VL 表现出显著改进。此外，Seed1.8 展示了高效的长上下文保持能力，在最大视频 token 限制为 81,920 的情况下，与 Gemini-2.5/3-Pro 表现相当。

items.en: Streaming. In the streaming domain, Seed1.8 achieves SOTA performance on OVBench [31], LiveSports-3K [11] and OVOBench [46]. Beyond standard comprehension, we significantly enhance the model’s proactive response capability—a vital feature for real-world applications. This enables the model to autonomously identify the optimal timing to intervene or respond within a continuous video stream without explicit triggers. Consequently, Seed1.8 achieves significant gains over Seed1.5-VL on interactivity-focused benchmarks like StreamingBench [36] and OmniMMI [73]. See Section 3.6 for qualitative examples of this visual proactivity.
items.zh: 流式。在流式领域，Seed1.8 在 OVBench [31]、LiveSports-3K [11] 和 OVOBench [46] 上取得了最先进性能。除了标准理解之外，我们显著增强了模型的主动响应能力——这是实际应用中的一个关键特性。这使得模型能够在连续视频流中自主识别干预或响应的最佳时机，而无需显式触发。因此，Seed1.8 在注重交互性的基准测试（如 StreamingBench [36] 和 OmniMMI [73]）上相比 Seed1.5-VL 取得了显著提升。有关这种视觉主动性的定性示例，请参见第 3.6 节。

items.en: We report the best-of-5 (Bo5) score here.
items.zh: 我们在此报告最佳 5 次中的最佳分数。

items.en: To rigorously assess Seed1.8’s capabilities in real-world scenarios, we design a comprehensive evaluation suite that prioritizes agentic capabilities, including general agentic search, visual search, agentic coding, agentic writing, tool use, and GUI operation. We also designed internal benchmarks simulating high-value real-world workflows, explicitly validating the Seed1.8’s economic utility in complex agentic tasks.
items.zh: 为了严格评估 Seed1.8 在真实场景中的能力，我们设计了一个全面的评估套件，优先考虑智能体能力，包括通用智能体搜索、视觉搜索、智能体编码、智能体写作、工具使用和 GUI 操作。我们还设计了模拟高价值真实工作流的内部基准测试，明确验证了 Seed1.8 在复杂智能体任务中的经济效用。

items.en: Specifically, we evaluate Seed1.8 on GAIA [44], BrowseComp-en [77], BrowseComp-zh [95], MM-BrowseComp [35], WideSearch [78], HLE [51], SWE-Bench Verified [47], Multi-SWE-Bench [87], AInstein-SWE-Bench, Terminal Bench 2.0 [64], U-Artifacts (internal), DeepConsult [62], DeepResearchBench [18], DiscoX [91], BFCL-v4 [50], and τ2\tau^{2}-Bench [5]. We designed three benchmarks mirroring expert-level and daily life workflows, including FinSearchComp [30], XpertBench (internal), and World Travel (internal) benchmarks. Results are summarized in Table 4.
items.zh: 具体来说，我们在 GAIA [44]、BrowseComp-en [77]、BrowseComp-zh [95]、MM-BrowseComp [35]、WideSearch [78]、HLE [51]、SWE-Bench Verified [47]、Multi-SWE-Bench [87]、AInstein-SWE-Bench、Terminal Bench 2.0 [64]、U-Artifacts（内部）、DeepConsult [62]、DeepResearchBench [18]、DiscoX [91]、BFCL-v4 [50] 和 τ²-Bench [5] 上评估了 Seed1.8。我们设计了三个反映专家级和日常生活工作流的基准测试，包括 FinSearchComp [30]、XpertBench（内部）和 World Travel（内部）基准测试。结果总结在表 4 中。

items.en: In real-world agent tasks, fast and reliable search capabilities are essential for making good decisions. Seed1.8 is built on industry-leading search and information handling, which gives it a powerful foundation for overall agent autonomy. Seed1.8 achieves the highest score (93.2) on GAIA [44], beating GPT-5-high (76.7). We also see strong results in dedicated search tasks (67.6 on BrowseComp-en [77], 78.5 on BrowseComp-zh [95], 63.8 on WideSearch [78], 40.9 on HLE (text-only) [51]). These together confirm Seed1.8’s superior performance in complex search and information handling needed for real-world problem-solving. Beyond text-based retrieval, Seed1.8 integrates superior vision capabilities, directly augmenting its agentic planning and execution across multimodal tasks. It achieves highly competitive performance on multimodal search benchmarks, scoring 46.3 on MM-BrowseComp [35] and 31.5 on HLE-VL [51]. This performance validates the agent’s superior ability to synthesize visual inputs (charts, interface elements) to inform search decisions and guide complex multi-step navigation.
items.zh: 在真实世界的智能体任务中，快速可靠的搜索能力对于做出良好决策至关重要。Seed1.8 建立在行业领先的搜索和信息处理基础上，这为其整体智能体自主性提供了强大的基础。Seed1.8 在 GAIA [44] 上取得了最高分（93.2），超过了 GPT-5-high（76.7）。我们还在专门的搜索任务中看到了强劲结果（BrowseComp-en [77] 上 67.6，BrowseComp-zh [95] 上 78.5，WideSearch [78] 上 63.8，HLE（仅文本）[51] 上 40.9）。这些共同证实了 Seed1.8 在复杂搜索和信息处理方面的卓越性能，这是解决现实世界问题所必需的。除了基于文本的检索，Seed1.8 还集成了卓越的视觉能力，直接增强了其在多模态任务中的智能体规划和执行能力。它在多模态搜索基准测试上取得了极具竞争力的性能，在 MM-BrowseComp [35] 上得分为 46.3，在 HLE-VL [51] 上得分为 31.5。这一性能验证了智能体在综合视觉输入（图表、界面元素）以指导搜索决策和引导复杂多步导航方面的卓越能力。

items.en: Seed1.8 scores the second-best on AInstein-SWE-Bench and Terminal Bench 2.0 [64], and performs on par with leading LLMs in other agentic coding and tool use benchmarks like SWE-bench Verified [47], Multi-SWE-Bench [87], U-Artifacts, BFCL-v4 [50], and τ2\tau^{2}-Bench [5]. This validates its ability to implement code changes and use tools in complex environments. Further, as writing accounts for a large volume of online user interactions [9], we assess Seed1.8 on three agentic writing benchmarks, where it demonstrates performance competitive with top-tier LLMs.
items.zh: Seed1.8 在 AInstein-SWE-Bench 和 Terminal Bench 2.0 [64] 上取得了第二好的成绩，并在其他智能体编码和工具使用基准测试（如 SWE-bench Verified [47]、Multi-SWE-Bench [87]、U-Artifacts、BFCL-v4 [50] 和 τ²-Bench [5]）上与领先的 LLM 表现相当。这验证了其在复杂环境中实现代码更改和使用工具的能力。此外，由于写作占在线用户交互的很大一部分 [9]，我们在三个智能体写作基准测试上评估了 Seed1.8，其表现与顶级 LLM 具有竞争力。

items.en: The ultimate measure of agentic capability is its translation into tangible economic value and high Return on Investment (ROI) in professional domains.
items.zh: 智能体能力的最终衡量标准是其在专业领域转化为切实的经济价值和高投资回报率。

items.en: Financial Market Proficiency: On FinSearchComp [30], which tests complex retrieval and synthesis within financial data, Seed1.8 scores 56.2, confirming competitive performance against proprietary leaders. This validates the model’s reliability in handling core tasks like detailed financial reporting and critical market intelligence, where accuracy directly drives decision support.
items.zh: 金融市场熟练度：在测试金融数据中复杂检索和综合的 FinSearchComp [30] 上，Seed1.8 得分为 56.2，确认了与专有领导者相比的竞争力。这验证了该模型在处理核心任务（如详细的财务报告和关键市场情报）方面的可靠性，其中准确性直接驱动决策支持。

items.en: Expert Workload Automation: XpertBench results confirm Seed1.8’s readiness for expert-level workloads, particularly excelling in Finance (62.0) and Law (55.2). These specific domain proficiencies enable the immediate automation of challenging workflows—such as contract review, regulatory analysis, and complex data interpretation—delivering direct cost savings and enhancing operational efficiency for the business. Several examples are detailed in section˜3.2.
items.zh: 专家工作负载自动化：XpertBench 结果证实了 Seed1.8 已准备好处理专家级工作负载，特别是在金融（62.0）和法律（55.2）方面表现出色。这些特定领域的熟练度使得能够立即自动化具有挑战性的工作流——例如合同审查、监管分析和复杂数据解释——从而为企业带来直接的成本节约并提高运营效率。第 3.2 节详细介绍了几个示例。

items.en: Daily Life Planning: Seed1.8 achieves the best performance on the WorldTravel benchmark (multimodal setting), demonstrating its practical utility for multimodal information gathering, real-world scheduling and daily logistics.
items.zh: 日常生活规划：Seed1.8 在 WorldTravel 基准测试（多模态设置）上取得了最佳性能，展示了其在多模态信息收集、现实世界调度和日常物流方面的实用效用。

items.en: The empirical results compiled in Table 5 clearly demonstrate the Seed1.8 model’s highly competitive, state-of-the-art capabilities within the complex domain of GUI Agents. Achieving peak performance across four key public benchmarks—OSWorld, Realbench, Online-Mind2web, and AndroidWorld. Seed1.8 validates its robust generalization capacity and exceptional efficacy in automating tasks across diverse GUI platforms, spanning computer, web-based, and mobile environments. Crucially, this superior performance profile establishes a new and significantly elevated baseline for the Seed model family, marking a major advancement over its predecessor, Seed1.5-VL.
items.zh: 表 5 中汇总的实验结果清楚地表明，Seed1.8 模型在 GUI Agent 的复杂领域内具有高度竞争力和最先进的能力。在四个关键公开基准测试（OSWorld、Realbench、Online-Mind2web 和 AndroidWorld）上取得了峰值性能。Seed1.8 验证了其强大的泛化能力和在跨不同 GUI 平台（包括计算机、基于 Web 和移动环境）自动化任务方面的卓越效能。至关重要的是，这种优越的性能表现为 Seed 模型系列建立了一个新的、显著提升的基线，标志着其前身 Seed1.5-VL 的重大进步。

items.en: A key focus of the Seed1.8 release is its significantly enhanced mobile use capability, evidenced by consistently superior performance across internal mobile evaluation sets. The model demonstrates advanced capabilities in handling complex, multi-step tasks specific to the mobile environment, including improved instruction following and intent comprehension, and can proactively determine when user assistance is required for robust task completion. Representative case studies illustrating this sophisticated task processing are detailed in Section 3.5.
items.zh: Seed1.8 发布的一个关键焦点是其显著增强的移动使用能力，这由在内部移动评估集上持续卓越的性能所证明。该模型展示了处理移动环境特有的复杂多步任务的高级能力，包括改进的指令遵循和意图理解，并且可以主动确定何时需要用户协助以完成稳健的任务。第 3.5 节详细介绍了说明这种复杂任务处理的代表性案例研究。

items.en: Seed1.8 supports video tool-use to enable high-frame-rate (HFR) playback of video clips, capturing local details within the video and thereby enhancing video understanding and reasoning capabilities. Specifically, Seed1.8 integrates the VideoCut tool: Seed1.8 specifies the start and end timestamps of the clip to be replayed as well as the desired FPS (ranging from 1 to 5), and the VideoCut tool resamples the video frames to provide them to the model for further reasoning. Leveraging VideoCut, Seed1.8 can revisit informative segments of long videos and achieve slow-motion playback by increasing FPS to capture more details and motion dynamics.
items.zh: Seed1.8 支持视频工具使用，能够实现视频片段的高帧率（HFR）回放，捕捉视频中的局部细节，从而增强视频理解和推理能力。具体来说，Seed1.8 集成了 VideoCut 工具：Seed1.8 指定要重放片段的起始和结束时间戳以及所需的 FPS（范围为 1 到 5），VideoCut 工具对视频帧进行重采样，提供给模型进行进一步推理。利用 VideoCut，Seed1.8 可以重新审视长视频中的信息片段，并通过增加 FPS 实现慢动作回放，以捕捉更多细节和运动动态。

items.en: We evaluate the performance of Seed1.8 with the VideoCut tool in Table 6. Notably, Seed1.8 achieved substantial performance improvements with the tool on long-video understanding benchmarks, i.e., CGBench [10] and LVBench [71]. Furthermore, on our in-house high-difficulty benchmark ZeroVideo, which comprises 101 extremely-challenging video questions covering long video reasoning, multi-hop reasoning, high-frame-rate motion understanding, and counterintuitive scenarios, Seed1.8 delivers significant performance gains when utilizing the tool, outperforming Gemini-2.5-Pro and Gemini-3-Pro. We present several examples from the ZeroVideo benchmark to demonstrate our video tool-use capabilities in section˜3.6.
items.zh: 我们在表 6 中评估了 Seed1.8 使用 VideoCut 工具的性能。值得注意的是，Seed1.8 在长视频理解基准（即 CGBench [10] 和 LVBench [71]）上使用该工具取得了显著的性能提升。此外，在我们内部的高难度基准 ZeroVideo 上（包含 101 个极具挑战性的视频问题，涵盖长视频推理、多跳推理、高帧率运动理解和反直觉场景），Seed1.8 在使用该工具时实现了显著的性能提升，优于 Gemini-2.5-Pro 和 Gemini-3-Pro。我们在第 3.6 节中展示了 ZeroVideo 基准的几个示例，以演示我们的视频工具使用能力。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Thinking efficiency comparison on textual reasoning tasks against previous models.
items.capZh: 图 1：在文本推理任务上与先前模型的思考效率比较。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Thinking efficiency comparison on multi-modal reasoning tasks against previous models.
items.capZh: 图 2：在多模态推理任务上与先前模型的思考效率比较。

items.en: We evaluate Seed1.8 against frontier models including GPT-5.1 and Gemini-3-Pro, alongside its predecessor Seed-1.6 (on which we firstly introduce various thinking modes), across varying inference budgets. Figure 1 and Figure 2 illustrate the trade-off between inference compute and model performance on textual and multi-modal reasoning tasks, demonstrating a significant improvement in inference efficiency over Seed1.6. On BeyondAIME and KORBench, compared with the previous generation, Seed1.8 has achieved steady and consistent improvements at the same inference token usage level. For multi-modal reasoning tasks, on MMMU-Pro [86], Seed1.8 achieves 65.4 in “NoThink” mode, marking a significant improvement over Seed-1.6 (61.0) and drastically outperforming GPT-5.1 (43.5); this substantial gap suggests stronger internalized knowledge, enabling the model to resolve moderate-difficulty queries with minimal overhead. Furthermore, the model exhibits significantly steeper scaling trajectories than its predecessor, effectively utilizing additional test-time compute to unlock higher performance ceilings where Seed-1.6 tends to plateau. This is most evident on the challenging Mathvision [70] benchmark, where Seed1.8 peaks at 81.3 — a 9.5% absolute gain over Seed-1.6 and a decisive lead over GPT-5.1’s 77.2. Crucially, Seed1.8 dominates the Pareto frontier in terms of token efficiency; on EMMA [26], its “No-Think” performance (50.1) already surpasses the fully scaled “High” compute performance of the previous generation (48.1).
items.zh: 我们评估了 Seed1.8 与前沿模型（包括 GPT-5.1 和 Gemini-3-Pro）及其前身 Seed-1.6（我们首次在其中引入各种思考模式）在不同推理预算下的性能。图 1 和图 2 展示了文本和多模态推理任务上推理算力与模型性能之间的权衡，表明与 Seed1.6 相比，推理效率显著提升。在 BeyondAIME 和 KORBench 上，与上一代相比，Seed1.8 在相同推理 token 使用水平上实现了稳定且一致的改进。对于多模态推理任务，在 MMMU-Pro [86] 上，Seed1.8 在“NoThink”模式下达到 65.4，相比 Seed-1.6（61.0）有显著提升，并大幅优于 GPT-5.1（43.5）；这一显著差距表明更强的内化知识，使模型能够以最小的开销解决中等难度的查询。此外，该模型展现出比其前身更陡峭的缩放轨迹，有效利用额外的测试时算力来解锁更高的性能上限，而 Seed-1.6 则趋于平稳。这在具有挑战性的 Mathvision [70] 基准上最为明显，Seed1.8 峰值达到 81.3——比 Seed-1.6 绝对提升 9.5%，并领先于 GPT-5.1 的 77.2。关键的是，Seed1.8 在 token 效率方面主导了帕累托前沿；在 EMMA [26] 上，其“No-Think”性能（50.1）已经超过了上一代完全缩放的“High”算力性能（48.1）。

items.en: Seed1.8 can process multimodal inputs with high token efficiency. Especially for video understanding which consumes large amounts of input tokens, Seed1.8 is capable of achieving impressive results with a minimal token budget. As illustrated in the Figure 3, we evaluate the performance of Seed1.5-VL and Seed1.8 across three challenging long-video test sets (CGBench [10], LVBench [71], VideoMME [21]) by employing different token budgets. As Figure 3, both Seed1.8 and Seed1.5-VL exhibit significant performance improvements in long-video understanding as ‘Max Video Tokens’ increase; however, Seed1.8 delivers exceptional accuracy even with a 32K token budget—markedly outperforming Seed1.5-VL (which uses an 80K token budget) across all three evaluation benchmarks, thus demonstrating its stronger token efficiency for multimodal tasks, especially for long-form video inputs.
items.zh: Seed1.8 能够以高 token 效率处理多模态输入。特别是对于消耗大量输入 token 的视频理解，Seed1.8 能够以最小的 token 预算取得令人印象深刻的结果。如图 3 所示，我们通过使用不同的 token 预算，评估了 Seed1.5-VL 和 Seed1.8 在三个具有挑战性的长视频测试集（CGBench [10]、LVBench [71]、VideoMME [21]）上的性能。如图 3 所示，随着“最大视频 token”的增加，Seed1.8 和 Seed1.5-VL 在长视频理解方面都表现出显著的性能提升；然而，Seed1.8 即使在 32K token 预算下也能提供卓越的准确性——在所有三个评估基准上明显优于 Seed1.5-VL（使用 80K token 预算），从而展示了其在多模态任务（尤其是长视频输入）中更强的 token 效率。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Token efficiency comparison between Seed1.8 and Seed1.5-VL across several long-video understanding benchmarks, i.e., CGBench [10], LVBench [71] and VideoMME [21], as Max Video Tokens increase.
items.capZh: 图 3：随着最大视频 token 的增加，Seed1.8 和 Seed1.5-VL 在多个长视频理解基准（即 CGBench [10]、LVBench [71] 和 VideoMME [21]）上的 token 效率比较。

items.en: Seed1.8 supports allocating additional computation during inference to address more complex tasks. By increasing test-time compute and enabling parallel reasoning paths, the model can explore alternative solution trajectories and aggregate intermediate results. This setting leads to improved performance on challenging reasoning tasks across mathematics, competitive coding, STEM, and vision reasoning, as summarized in Table 7.
items.zh: Seed1.8 支持在推理期间分配额外的计算来处理更复杂的任务。通过增加测试时算力并启用并行推理路径，模型可以探索替代解决方案轨迹并聚合中间结果。这种设置导致在数学、竞争性编程、STEM 和视觉推理等具有挑战性的推理任务上性能提升，如表 7 所示。

items.en: Seed1.8 demonstrates significantly stronger agent execution efficiency, particularly in long-horizon task settings. This efficiency allows the agent to allocate fewer steps to exploration while maintaining a strong focus on goal-relevant actions, resulting in more effective and stable decision-making overall. This advantage is clearly illustrated on the BrowseComp benchmark in Figure 4. Under low and medium reasoning effort, the model achieves 45.0 and 55.0, respectively, with fewer than 50 execution steps. When switching to unlimited mode, Seed1.8 exhibits clear scaling behavior: as the number of steps increases, performance continues to improve steadily, reaching a score of 67.6 at 150 steps.
items.zh: Seed1.8 展现出显著更强的智能体执行效率，特别是在长期任务设置中。这种效率使智能体能够分配更少的步骤进行探索，同时保持对目标相关行动的强烈关注，从而整体上实现更有效和稳定的决策。这一优势在图 4 的 BrowseComp 基准上得到了清晰展示。在低和中等推理努力下，模型在少于 50 个执行步骤的情况下分别达到 45.0 和 55.0。当切换到无限模式时，Seed1.8 表现出清晰的缩放行为：随着步骤数的增加，性能持续稳步提升，在 150 步时达到 67.6 分。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Evaluation of agent execution efficiency on Browsecomp with varying reasoning efforts.
items.capZh: 图 4：在 Browsecomp 上使用不同推理努力的智能体执行效率评估。

items.en: In this section, we demonstrate the practical utility of Seed1.8 through various real-world examples.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们通过各种真实世界示例展示 Seed1.8 的实际效用。

items.en: Travel planning is a common but demanding task in everyday life. Users typically have to navigate fragmented information across multiple platforms, balancing time, budget, and personal preferences simultaneously. It involves interacting with complex visual interfaces, such as checking availability on dynamic calendars or comparing prices on booking pages, rather than just processing text. We design WorldTravel benchmark using synthetic webpages (Figure 5, Top) to mirror these tasks.
items.zh: 旅行规划是日常生活中常见但要求较高的任务。用户通常需要在多个平台间导航碎片化信息，同时平衡时间、预算和个人偏好。它涉及与复杂的视觉界面交互，例如检查动态日历上的可用性或比较预订页面上的价格，而不仅仅是处理文本。我们使用合成网页（图 5，顶部）设计了 WorldTravel 基准来模拟这些任务。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Travel planning assistance task (multimodal setting). Top: Web pages processed by the model for information gathering. Bottom: Example input and the resulting output from Seed1.8.
items.capZh: 图 5：旅行规划辅助任务（多模态设置）。顶部：模型用于信息收集的网页。底部：Seed1.8 的示例输入和输出结果。

items.en: Real-world expert tasks validate the agent’s capability to act as a professional assistant. We illustrate how Seed1.8 effectively handles complex, domain-specific challenges encountered in actual professional environments. As shown in Table LABEL:tab:expert, Seed1.8 is able to deal with expert-level tasks that closely mirror real-world professional workflows across various domains. These tasks go beyond simple queries, requiring the agent to synthesize deep domain knowledge and execute complex, multi-step procedures typical of human experts. The full responses of Seed1.8 can be found in Appendix C.2.
items.zh: 真实世界的专家任务验证了智能体作为专业助手的能力。我们展示了 Seed1.8 如何有效处理实际专业环境中遇到的复杂、特定领域的挑战。如表 LABEL:tab:expert 所示，Seed1.8 能够处理与各领域真实专业工作流程密切相关的专家级任务。这些任务超越了简单查询，要求智能体综合深度领域知识并执行人类专家典型的复杂多步骤流程。Seed1.8 的完整回答可在附录 C.2 中找到。

items.en: Based on the advanced vision and reasoning capabilities, Seed1.8 can solve complex scientific problems directly from visual inputs. Here we show one specific example of biology research task from our internal BIOBench.
items.zh: 基于先进的视觉和推理能力，Seed1.8 可以直接从视觉输入解决复杂的科学问题。这里我们展示来自我们内部 BIOBench 的一个生物学研究任务的具体示例。

items.en: Based on its strong vision processing, reasoning, and solid knowledge base, Seed1.8 solved this entire series of biology research problems successfully The full response of Seed1.8 can be found in Appendix C.3.
items.zh: 凭借其强大的视觉处理、推理和扎实的知识库，Seed1.8 成功解决了这一系列生物学研究问题。Seed1.8 的完整回答可在附录 C.3 中找到。

items.en: We now move on to scientific software engineering tasks that require both solid scientific background knowledge and agentic coding capabilities. We showcase one specific task from our internal AInstein-SWE-Bench in the following.
items.zh: 我们现在转向需要扎实科学背景知识和智能体式编码能力的科学软件工程任务。我们在下面展示来自我们内部 AInstein-SWE-Bench 的一个具体任务。

items.en: Numerical relativity (NR) is a branch of research in general relativity (GR) using numerical methods to solve Einstein’s equations, as well as equations of matter like hydrodynamics and electromagnetism. By explicitly splitting 4 dimensional spacetime into 3D space and 1D time, it formulates GR as an initial value problem [24]. EisnteinToolkit is a collection of C/C++/Fortran codes for numerical relativity simulations [1, 40]. Cactus Computation Language (CCL) is used to manage simulations. One simulation would involve several executables (compiled from multiple collections of C/C++/Fortran codes), operating in a manner defined by the ccl files. We define a question by ablating a functionality of EinsteinToolkit in a Docker container by removing parts of the source code, and task LLM with implementing the missing functionality by completing the missing code.
items.zh: 数值相对论（NR）是广义相对论（GR）的一个研究分支，使用数值方法求解爱因斯坦方程，以及物质方程（如流体动力学和电磁学）。通过将四维时空显式分解为三维空间和一维时间，它将 GR 表述为初值问题 [24]。EinsteinToolkit 是用于数值相对论模拟的 C/C++/Fortran 代码集合 [1, 40]。Cactus 计算语言（CCL）用于管理模拟。一次模拟将涉及多个可执行文件（从多个 C/C++/Fortran 代码集合编译而来），以 ccl 文件定义的方式运行。我们通过从 Docker 容器中的 EinsteinToolkit 移除部分源代码来消融其功能，从而定义一个问题，并让 LLM 通过完成缺失的代码来实现缺失的功能。

items.en: After careful mathematical derivation, numerical stability considerations,and tool-assisted code exploration, Seed1.8 successfully solved this problem. The summarization of the full response can be found in Appendix C.4.
items.zh: 经过仔细的数学推导、数值稳定性考虑和工具辅助的代码探索，Seed1.8 成功解决了这个问题。完整回答的总结可在附录 C.4 中找到。

items.en: To better illustrate the practical capabilities and advanced mechanisms of Seed1.8 for GUI tasks, we present a representative use case in Figure 6. This case focuses on a long-horizon comparative shopping task that requires the agent to aggregate information across multiple distinct web services. The task demanded that the agent find and compare the prices of a specific item across three different e-commerce platforms. Seed1.8 successfully completed this complex objective, requiring a total of 122 sequential steps for completion. This performance demonstrates the model’s exceptional ability in long-term task decomposition, multi-site navigation, and synthesizing information gathered from disparate sources, which is critical for real-world automated planning.
items.zh: 为了更好地说明 Seed1.8 在 GUI 任务中的实际能力和高级机制，我们在图 6 中展示了一个代表性用例。该案例侧重于一个长期比较购物任务，要求智能体跨多个不同的网络服务聚合信息。该任务要求智能体在三个不同的电子商务平台上查找并比较特定商品的价格。Seed1.8 成功完成了这一复杂目标，总共需要 122 个连续步骤。这一性能展示了该模型在长期任务分解、多站点导航和综合来自不同来源的信息方面的卓越能力，这对于现实世界的自动化规划至关重要。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Task instruction - “I have a 40×4040\times 40 bare tank and want to keep a snakehead fish. Please select the most cost-effective filter, anti-jump net, and heater for me across various shopping apps.”
items.capZh: 图6：任务指令——“我有一个40×40的裸缸，想养一条蛇头鱼。请在各购物应用中为我选择最具性价比的过滤器、防跳网和加热器。”

items.en: In Figure 7 & 8, we present examples from ZeroVideo. Compared with conventional video benchmarks, ZeroVideo emphasizes long-video reasoning, focusing on highly challenging multi-hop reasoning and high–frame-rate perception. We also report Seed1.8’s reasoning trajectories with tool use in Figure 7 & 8. Notably, Seed1.8 supports hour-scale video inputs and demonstrates strong temporal grounding and long-video retrieval, which we view as fundamental capabilities for video reasoning models. For multi-hop questions, Seed1.8 can disentangle relationships among clues and, guided by these clues, adopt VideoCut to replay fine-grained details in relevant segments. By repeatedly revisiting key moments, Seed1.8 can derive the correct answers. Finally, examples across diverse scenarios indicate that Seed1.8’s video tool-use is broadly applicable and can support more complicated video reasoning tasks.
items.zh: 在图7和图8中，我们展示了ZeroVideo的示例。与传统的视频基准相比，ZeroVideo强调长视频推理，专注于极具挑战性的多跳推理和高帧率感知。我们还报告了Seed1.8在使用工具时的推理轨迹。值得注意的是，Seed1.8支持小时级视频输入，并展现出强大的时间定位和长视频检索能力，我们认为这些是视频推理模型的基础能力。对于多跳问题，Seed1.8能够理清线索之间的关系，并在这些线索的引导下，采用VideoCut重放相关片段中的细粒度细节。通过反复回顾关键时刻，Seed1.8能够得出正确答案。最后，不同场景下的示例表明，Seed1.8的视频工具使用具有广泛的适用性，能够支持更复杂的视频推理任务。

items.capEn: Figure 7: ZeroVideo Example 1: Long Video Object Retrieval. This example requires the model to determine a dog’s breed from hour-long driving video, necessitating multi-hop reasoning and temporal localization over long-form video; since the vehicle is in motion, it also relies on robust high–frame-rate recognition. In this case, Seed1.8 first localizes the exact timestamp corresponding to the license plate mentioned in the prompt, then repeatedly invokes the VideoCut tool to refine the relevant segments, ultimately identifying the dog as a Shiba Inu.
items.capZh: 图7：ZeroVideo示例1：长视频物体检索。该示例要求模型从长达一小时的驾驶视频中确定狗的品种，这需要在长视频上进行多跳推理和时间定位；由于车辆在行驶中，还依赖于稳健的高帧率识别。在此案例中，Seed1.8首先定位到提示中提到的车牌对应的精确时间戳，然后反复调用VideoCut工具来细化相关片段，最终识别出狗为柴犬。

items.capEn: Figure 8: ZeroVideo Example 2: Urban Navigation with Videos. This example requires the model to infer the travel route from a city tour video, which depends on its ability to perform multi-hop localization and reasoning over long-form video, as well as its navigation capabilities. Seed1.8 uses VideoCut to identify the approximate temporal window and then carefully analyzes each road crossing, demonstrating the model’s impressive long-video understanding.
items.capZh: 图8：ZeroVideo示例2：基于视频的城市导航。该示例要求模型从城市旅游视频中推断出行路线，这依赖于其在长视频上进行多跳定位和推理的能力，以及导航能力。Seed1.8使用VideoCut识别出大致的时间窗口，然后仔细分析每个路口，展示了模型令人印象深刻的长视频理解能力。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Qualitative demonstration of real-time streaming video understanding and interaction. In the continuous video stream, the model ingests frames at 1FPS, with timestamps and user instructions denoted on the top. The model’s frame-wise behaviors are depicted at the bottom, including immediate response to user instructions (speech balloon), silent reasoning (thinking face) and visual proactive response (light bulb). Notably, the generation process could be interrupted by incoming frames; upon receiving a new frame, the model dynamically determines whether to resume the suspended content (indicated by …).
items.capZh: 图9：实时流式视频理解与交互的定性演示。在连续视频流中，模型以1FPS的速率摄取帧，顶部标注了时间戳和用户指令。底部描绘了模型逐帧的行为，包括对用户指令的即时响应（语音气泡）、静默推理（思考表情）和视觉主动响应（灯泡）。值得注意的是，生成过程可能被传入的帧中断；收到新帧后，模型动态决定是否恢复暂停的内容（以…表示）。

items.en: To further interpret the model’s capacity in real-world streaming scenarios, we present an example in Figure 9. The model processes a continuous video stream at 1 FPS while simultaneously generating responses. As depicted in the figure, the model exhibits versatile interaction states, capable of switching between three modes: providing immediate responses to explicit user queries, maintaining silent reasoning to track context, and initiating visual proactive responses triggered by visual events. It is worth mentioning that the model’s response generation could be preempted by the new video frame. Once interrupted, the model dynamically evaluates the updated context. If the suspended response aligns with the updated visual context, the model seamlessly resumes the ongoing generation, ensuring the coherency of the dialogue despite the discrete visual input.
items.zh: 为了进一步解释模型在真实流式场景中的能力，我们在图9中展示了一个示例。模型以1FPS处理连续视频流，同时生成响应。如图所示，模型表现出多种交互状态，能够在三种模式之间切换：对显式用户查询提供即时响应、保持静默推理以跟踪上下文、以及由视觉事件触发的视觉主动响应。值得一提的是，模型的响应生成可能被新的视频帧抢占。一旦中断，模型会动态评估更新后的上下文。如果暂停的响应与更新的视觉上下文一致，模型会无缝恢复正在进行的生成，确保对话的连贯性，尽管视觉输入是离散的。

items.en: Safety is a top priority at Seed1.8. We have established strict guidelines to ensure our models refuse harmful content and comply with ethical and legal standards. Figure 10 presents Seed1.8’s performance on two open-source benchmarks: AIR-Bench [88] and XSTest [59]. The results demonstrate that Seed1.8 improves a lot on AIR-Bench while maintaining high performance on XSTest.
items.zh: 安全是Seed1.8的首要任务。我们制定了严格的指导方针，确保我们的模型拒绝有害内容，并遵守道德和法律标准。图10展示了Seed1.8在两个开源基准上的表现：AIR-Bench [88] 和 XSTest [59]。结果表明，Seed1.8在AIR-Bench上提升显著，同时在XSTest上保持高性能。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Model Performance on Safety Benchmarks.
items.capZh: 图10：模型在安全基准上的表现。

items.en: Additionally, we have constructed internal benchmarks to assess Seed1.8’s safety, where we focus on various types of risky content, including Civil Norms, Pornography, Illegal Acts, Copyright, Medical Safety, Identity, etc. As shown below in Table LABEL:tab:safety_eval, Seed1.8 consistently rejects unsafe inputs in these areas and provides responsible responses.
items.zh: 此外，我们构建了内部基准来评估Seed1.8的安全性，重点关注各种类型的风险内容，包括公民规范、色情、违法行为、版权、医疗安全、身份等。如下表LABEL:tab:safety_eval所示，Seed1.8在这些领域持续拒绝不安全输入，并提供负责任的响应。

items.en: This report presents Seed1.8, a foundation model developed to support generalized real-world agency. The model is designed to combine strong base LLM and VLM capabilities with support for multimodal perception, tool use, and multi-step task execution under practical deployment constraints. Model development is guided by evaluations that extend beyond static academic benchmarks to include real-world–oriented workflows and agentic tasks. By incorporating benchmarks derived from practical use cases, we aim to assess model behavior in settings that more closely reflect interactive and applied usage. Seed1.8 is released to enable further experimentation and development by the research and developer communities. We expect that its capabilities will be explored, adapted, and extended across a range of applications, and that feedback from downstream use will inform future iterations of the model.
items.zh: 本报告介绍了Seed1.8，这是一个为支持通用现实世界智能体而开发的基础模型。该模型旨在结合强大的基础LLM和VLM能力，支持多模态感知、工具使用以及在实际部署约束下的多步骤任务执行。模型开发以评估为指导，这些评估超越了静态的学术基准，涵盖了面向现实世界的工作流程和智能体任务。通过纳入源自实际用例的基准，我们旨在评估模型在更贴近交互式和实际应用的场景中的行为。Seed1.8已发布，以便研究和开发者社区进行进一步的实验和开发。我们期望其能力将在各种应用中得到探索、适配和扩展，并且下游使用的反馈将为模型的未来迭代提供信息。
